notes: Runs completely stable, but mouse movement causes some stutter on a clean install. Setting cpu cycles to 10000 in "dosbox.conf" improves it, but mouse movement still causes some minor lag. Other than that it seems playable.
title: X-COM: Terror From the Deep

notes: With Proton the game has very high input lag and crashes when Steam Overlay is turned on. With steam-dos (https://github.com/dreamer/steam-dos), game works perfectly. Turn on MIDI by running SETUP.EXE and setting General MIDI and port 330 (this game has amazing music).
title: X-COM: Terror From the Deep

notes: Mouse and menu acting weird suddenly swift to deployment screen and freezes
title: X-COM: Terror From the Deep
